title: Connect and Operate MCP in Codex and Claude · Threat Case: Codex Config
summary: Configure one safe server in both Codex and Claude Code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext codex config increment in cross-client MCP configuration and smoke tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
